prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-PFPYENL-STD-YLLW Product Type: PLANNER Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Productive Fitness Poster Yoga Exercises Non Laminated Description: Work out at home with the Productive Fitness Series Posters.

Written and designed by experts, these posters are intended to help you learn proper exercise technique and form. Each is detailed with easy to follow step by step instructions, as well as descriptive color photos.

Each poster is 24" x 36", so it'll fit anywhere you intend to exercise. They are ideal for home use, so you'll never have to worry about going all the way to the gym.

Yoga posters available: Laminated or Non-Laminated. Search Terms: warm up lower medicine ball exercises exercise poster productive fitness education sports gym nutrition fit instruction instructions chart training practice guide photos visual diagram stretching yoga workout workouts body building strength weights Features: - DESIGNED BY EXPERTS - All Exercises Written by Fitness Experts | Safe for Beginners - LEARN PROPER TECHNIQUE - Specifically Designed to Teach Correct Exercise Form - EASY TO FOLLOW - Includes Detailed and Step by Step Instructions for All Work Out Levels - COLORFUL PHOTOS - Descriptive and Vibrant Images Demonstrate Correct Technique - IDEAL FOR HOME USE - Easily Hangs from Any Wall | Skip the Gym and Work Out at Home === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Productive Fitness Yoga Exercises Poster 24x36 Yellow
